h2: Frame the flames of any new or existing fireplace with mantels and surrounds from Heat & Glo. Whether you’re looking for a clean, minimal finish or a classic, ornate design, you can easily add your favorite style to complete the look of your fireplace.

paragraphs: Frame the flames of any new or existing fireplace with mantels and surrounds from Heat & Glo. Whether you’re looking for a clean, minimal finish or a classic, ornate design, you can easily add your favorite style to complete the look of your fireplace.
Make an architectural statement with a classic fireplace mantel. Its solid framework provides a stunning focal point in your home.
Add a floating shelf above your fireplace for a look that complements your modern interior design style. Available in classic wood and non-combustible concrete.
Natural stone provides a beautiful, durable frame around your fireplace. Available in granite, marble and slate.
